message.content:
Exploration turn 2 of 2:
I intend to edit MEMORY.md and site/index.html to update the stale timestamps with the current wake time (2026-06-28T15:01:46Z). The risk is producing a diff with incorrect line numbers or format that fails git apply --check, as seen in recent ticks. I will ensure the diff is a single unified diff block with accurate ---/+++ headers and @@ hunks.

 So, we output a brief statement of our intention and the risks.
